token_optimisations.detail: Weekly limit at <90% remaining. QUANT-01 needs 5-domain parallel audit (~65k agent). No v5.37 items depend on it. Locked in session_022.
Data freshness items (originally v5.37c) merged into v5.37b sprint. Avoids separate sprint-start overhead and regression baseline confirmation cycle.
String substitutions in separate files (litellm-proxy/config.yaml + sprint_planner.py vs portfolio.py + week_summary.py). Both are Haiku-qualified. Worktree isolation ensures no conflict.
RSS constant replacement (market_data.py) and static caption (global_intelligence.py) are independent. Both Haiku-qualified. Worktree isolation.

Eliminated full GSI_session.json read (42k), full GSI_GOVERNANCE.md read (3k), full snapshot history read (~5k rolling). Replaced with targeted offset reads and CLAUDE.md cross-references. Now costs ~5k vs prior ~52k.
DF-01 period fix and OPEN-027 SEBI caption are both in home.py. Single Read + two targeted Edits. Combined into one item rather than two separate agent dispatches.
